mapper.sql: ec.id, ec.category_id AS categoryId, c.category AS category, ec.item_code AS itemCode, ec.item_label AS itemLabel, ec.sort_order AS sortOrder, c.is_system AS isSystem, ec.is_enabled AS isEnabled, ec.remark
mapper.select: select from enum_configs ec inner join enum_categories c on ec.category_id = c.id order by c.category, ec.sort_order, ec.id

select ec.id, ec.category_id AS categoryId, ec.item_code AS itemCode, ec.item_label AS itemLabel, ec.sort_order AS sortOrder, ec.is_enabled AS isEnabled, ec.remark from enum_configs ec where ec.category_id = #{categoryId} order by ec.sort_order, ec.id
select category from enum_categories order by category

select c.category as category, c.category_name as categoryName, c.is_system as isSystem, count(ec.id) as itemCount, coalesce(sum(case when ec.is_enabled = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledCount from enum_categories c left join enum_configs ec on ec.category_id = c.id group by c.id, c.category, c.category_name, c.is_system order by c.category
select from enum_configs ec inner join enum_categories c on ec.category_id = c.id where ec.id = #{id}
select from enum_configs ec inner join enum_categories c on ec.category_id = c.id where c.category = #{category} and ec.item_code = #{itemCode}
mapper.insert: insert into enum_configs(category_id, item_code, item_label, sort_order, is_enabled, remark) values(#{categoryId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemLabel}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark})
